fir_draft:
FIRST INFORMATION REPORT
(Under Section 154 CrPC)

1. District: Jamshedpur, Jharkhand
2. Act & Sections: Section 66D IT Act, Section 319(2) BNS (Impersonation)
3. Details of Incident: The victim received a WhatsApp call from an unknown suspect claiming to be a CBI official. The suspect threatened the victim with legal consequences under 'Digital Arrest' and coerced a UPI transfer of 50,000 INR.
executive_summary: High-urgency financial fraud involving digital arrest tactics. Suspect impersonated law enforcement officials to extract immediate payment via UPI.
recommended_actions: Freeze the recipient UPI address / Bank Account immediately.
Issue notice under Section 91 CrPC to the telecom service provider for the linked phone number.
Deploy patrol to identified geospatial hotspot cluster.
